comment: Expansion #4 Step-2 fan-out, shape B (dict->list[str]). Transcribed verbatim from scraper_aeammo.py inline CALIBER_PATHS on 2026-06-14, parity-proven byte-identical before flip. ASYNC-Playwright (async_api); BigCommerce stencil. Scraper keys off RETAILER_ID=11 (no slug lookup). 22lr points at the /Ammo/Rimfire-Ammo PARENT category (which lists 22 WMR/Short/CB alongside 22 LR); the card loop drops the off-caliber SKUs via normalize_caliber() at runtime — that bucketing is RUNTIME LOGIC, not a per-URL title_filter. The 2 status=parked entries (308win, 762x39) are genuine catalog absence, NOT URL drift: PARKED 2026-06-12 (first catches of the per-caliber zero-coverage alert; probe scripts/_probe_aeammo_ga_triage.py) — both category pages are alive (200, correct title) but render zero product cards and the rifle caliber facet lists neither cartridge; recovery slugs preserved here for re-activation when the facet reappears. Migration wiring: loader + report_empty_first_pages (swap of the inline EMPTY_FAIL_THRESHOLD block) + category_redirected at page 1 + had_success. Not yet harness-validated; validation null until Step-3. Approved by Jon, Step-2 fan-out, 2026-06-14.

22lr.source: manual: parent rimfire category, bucketed to 22lr by normalize_caliber at runtime

223-556.source: manual: 5.56 leg only; .223 Rem has no category page (filter-only, 403 to bots)

308win.source: PARKED 2026-06-12: genuine catalog absence (page 200 but zero products; facet lists neither). Re-activate when AE re-stocks.

762x39.source: PARKED 2026-06-12: genuine catalog absence (page 200 but zero products; facet lists neither). Re-activate when AE re-stocks.
